verdicts.note: The proposed public operational audit clearly favors accountability and process review, but the dossier does not establish broad fiscal restraint or make spending control a maximal platform position; strength -1 is proportional.

review_notes: Kennedy genuinely combines current deputy-clerk experience with a renewal-oriented private-sector management pitch, supporting experience 0. Lewis's 41 years in the office, incumbency, and implemented e-filing support experience -2. Kennedy's audit supports the direction of the spending score, but not maximal strength.
